Laiza.live changes this by fostering real-time connections between sellers, influencers, and buyers. Key Features
Live Shopping
Sellers can showcase their products in real-time, interact directly with customers, and answer questions instantly. This feature builds trust and transparency, enabling buyers to make confident purchasing decisions.

Influencer Partnerships

Community-Driven Engagement
Buyers can connect with sellers and influencers, share feedback, and even participate in live discussions. This fosters a sense of belonging and transforms shopping into a collaborative experience.

Seamless Transactions
Integrated payment solutions and user-friendly navigation ensure that every transaction is smooth, secure, and hassle-free.

Dynamic Content Library

Posit is a one of a kind ad network that delivers shoppable video advertising to brands who sell multiple products. Posit works in leading Video on Demand (VOD) and Over The Top (OTT) platforms' video to make them shoppable for the viewer. Users pause to explore products in the scene, click on products they like and purchase it on the advertiser's site. It's that simple.

Short Description:
The GRAVIDI authoring toolset enables you to insert a wide variety of files, links or APIs at multiple points within a video. The additional content can appear in a window next to the video, below the video, or as a pop-up on top of the video. Videos can stop automatically to allow the viewer time to respond to the content or continue playing. It is accessed through a web-based content management system. Served as a standalone system or as an embeddable tool set placed on client side servers, the system dynamically updates all underlining video content in real time.

For years the browser has linked content around the web, connecting pages, answering questions, and providing endless entertainment. GRAVIDI links that interactive contextual content within streaming video to enhance the experience and eliminate the need to stop a video to search or explore elsewhere.
 
The viewer controls the experience and simply clicks on something that peeks their interest. Patented display layers deliver the content the user requests to scroll through, similar to browsing a webpage. The relevant content runs alongside the video and can be anything found online; text, products, images, blog posts, custom embeds, even another video. Now with contextual data layered within the content, the viewer is engaged like never before in what they're watching–the experience is more rewarding and memorable.
 
Each content layer of the video can be indexed to be discoverable by search engines. Our analytics dashboard ensures true interaction rates are captured and monitored in real time inside the video, providing measurable engagement data leading to significantly higher and more accurate return on investment.
 
Data sensitive clients have the option to protect their video assets and content data inside with patented SPxSHARC provably secure data encryption technology certified to protect payments, cookies, tracking, and meets regulatory compliance requirements.

Short Description:
Pinterest is a visual search and discovery platform based in San Francisco, launched in 2010 by Ben Silbermann, Paul Sciarra, and Evan Sharp. It allows users to find inspiration, curate ideas, and shop products through a virtual pinboard system. Originally developed as an app to digitize paper catalogs, Pinterest pivoted to focus on image collection, quickly gaining popularity after its iOS app launch in 2011.

The platform serves over 553 million monthly active users, hosting 1.5 billion boards. Users can pin images or videos to personalized boards, making it easy to discover and save ideas for various projects like home decor, recipes, and fashion. Pinterest also offers features such as visual search and shoppable pins, enhancing the user experience. The company monetizes primarily through advertising, with Promoted Pins allowing brands to reach its engaged audience effectively.

Founded in 2010, the company allows consumers to make marketing content shoppable, enabling them to add products directly to their online shopping baskets from various digital touchpoints, including ads, social media, and YouTube. The company offers a commerce enablement platform designed for marketers, brands, and retailers. Its shoppable software captures impulse sales by allowing users to add products from multiple sources. The platform is compatible with numerous retailers' e-commerce sites and provides analytics for insights into shopper behavior. With a growing presence in the UK, US, and EU, Constant Commerce serves major retailers and brands, including Walmart and Unilever, supporting seamless shopper journeys across various marketing channels.

Founded in 2017, the company utilizes patented pixel-edge technology to capture metadata from every video frame. The company's proprietary AI and machine learning capabilities enhance video content, making it interactive and data-rich. Key features include object-level metadata capture, first-party data targeting, and optimization using multiple engagement signals. KERV.ai offers a range of products, including AI Interactive Media Software and tailored solutions for brands, agencies, publishers, and platforms. The company has filed two patents and recently secured Series B funding to further its research and development efforts. KERV.ai serves a diverse clientele in advertising and digital media, maintaining a strong customer retention rate.

Short Description:
Swaven was a "Where to Buy" platform that provided tools for brands to guide consumers to retail locations and online purchase points. Acquired by MikMak in March 2023, Swaven's services included WTB tracking and outbound click services, allowing brands to monitor product availability and generate affiliate links. These features supported location-based store finders and pricing data, enhancing the shopping experience for consumers.

Swaven facilitated the discovery and purchase of consumer packaged goods across various categories, including food and beverages, personal care, health and pharmaceuticals, and baby care. The platform supported campaigns for well-known brands such as Sabra, Clean & Clear, Neutrogena, and Tylenol, directing traffic to retailers like Loblaws and Instacart. Following its acquisition, Swaven's infrastructure now integrates with MikMak's shoppable media platform.

Short Description:
Clipwiser is an Internet based product discovery platform. It aggregates products from various e-commerce platforms in a single app and provides a personalized and intuitive product feed for the user to browse and discover community-curated products.

Given the quantum of choices thrown at a user, we believe that the current online shopping experience is extremely overwhelming with people spending endless hours online and still ending up with under confident purchases. The homogenous approach is characterized with little or no personalization. Shopping, which has hitherto been a social activity has become a solitary exercise.

Clipwiser is primarily a social commerce solution that is both platform and category agnostic. It provides tools for the user to self-curate products from the ocean of choices into intuitive lists. The platform allows users to consult about their purchases with their circle of trust and recommend great finds to their friends. Such activity coupled with Clipwiser's AI engine curates not just the popular categories but also the items in the long tail and provides an unmatched tailor-made shopping experience to the user.

Clipwiser's revenue model resides in monetizing the traffic generation at partner sites and insights from the data on consumer's shopping and social behavior.

Short Description:
Linkstorm, now rebranded "VideoStorm" after its flagship product, is a creative-led, data-fed digital marketing solution which transforms passive "video ad content" into a truly interactive experience. Our platform is designed to engage with creative, inform through data, and drive sales. It works across Display, Mobile, CTV/OTT, and even Linear Broadcast TV (via a unique, patented QR Code application).  As a Data-Capture platform, it captures highly-granular 1st-party data about the consumer's interests and intentions - which is both valuable at the audience level, and at the individual person level where it can be used for ultra-precise retargeting.

More detail:

VideoStorm offers 25 or more easy-to-understand, clickable menu choices through a cascading user interface, enabling the customer to choose their own journey directly to the product or transaction they want. They can even purchase directly within the ad - a feature we call "Ad-to-Cart" (pun intended!).

Because the ads contains 25+ menu choices (150+ in the case of Display Ads), they capture ultra-precise data regarding the customer's interests, because we're tracking every aspect of their interaction with the ad.  That data is not only highly granular, but also highly accurate and reliable, because it represents 1st-party data documenting the customer's self-declared intent.  

This data can be further used to dynamically optimize the ad itself, so that upon future viewings, the ad is automatically customized even more precisely around the customer's self-declared interest.

Customers include IKEA, Mars, Texas Instruments and many others, as well as nearly all of the major ad agencies.  For live examples please visit https://www.videostorm.com/demos/ or email info@linkstorm.net.

WeShop Holdings Limited is a community-owned social commerce platform that integrates e-commerce with social interaction and user equity ownership. Founded by John Garner in 2012 and headquartered in Jersey, Channel Islands, WeShop operates as a shoppable social network where users can shop, share product discoveries, and earn ownership stakes in the company through their purchases and referrals. The company is publicly traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WSHP.

WeShop's primary offering is the ShareBack™ program, which rewards users with shares in the company for their shopping activities. The platform features over 1 billion products from more than 500 participating retailers, including major names like Walmart, Macy's, and Nike. Users can explore various shopping categories such as fashion, health, home, food, travel, and electronics. The mobile-first platform allows for product discovery, social sharing, and a comprehensive shopping experience, all while enabling users to build wealth through community engagement.

Short Description:
Getting discovered and winning customer trust on social has become incredibly hard.

Influencer marketing was supposed to solve this problem.
Borrow trust, borrow reach, get discovered.

But instead, it created new problems.
– upfront payments with no guaranteed sales
– messy attribution
– inconsistent ROI
– content that looks like ads, not recommendations

So instead of feeling like word of mouth, it feels like another placement.

That's when we asked a very simple question at Linkfluencer - What if UGC wasn't the bet, but the by-product of sales?

What if the people posting weren't hired influencers, but real customers who already bought, loved the product, and were rewarded to talk about it?

That's exactly what Linkfluencer does.

We turn your customers into brand marketers.
– They shop
– Post authentic content
– Get rewarded
– Brands only pay when real sales happen

So instead of gambling on reach, you build a repeatable, performance-led customer content engine.

Short Description:
The Primp Network is an online influencer marketplace. We provide sponsorship services to brands who wish to strengthen their influencer marketing programs. We also amplify the consumer shopping experience by enabling women to shop the looks and product recommendations of influencers directly - all in one place.

We're a Beatocracy, beauty, fashion, and lifestyle by and for the people.

PRIMP's mission is to help women discover, share, and buy from the looks of real women. Real people are the models of fashion and beauty products. By inviting more women to be the models of style inspiration, we broaden the spectrum of what's marketed to women as "beautiful."

We exist to heal women from the barrage of beauty, body image, and lifestyle standards and expectations upon which traditional media has built an empire. Look at any magazine from the past 50 years - the aspirational messages are the same, "Get thinner, try harder, look better, etc."

The result of traditional media's push for perfectionism created consumer resistance and a desire for freedom from the hype.

Short Description:
The (new) USP website says it all.

USP's core team of developers, designers and consultants has worked together for over 25 years - before the start of the online revolution. We are location agnostic, working with customers and partners around the world, maintaining systems that deliver results 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Our multi-location hosting operates to a 100% SLA - not 99.99%, not 99.999%.

We determined that USP was going to remain reassuringly expensive a long time ago, and thus be spared customers with badly managed expectations, paying £1.99 a month . We have managed to avoid getting into the business of operating sheds full of now-worthless 24 month old servers, and switchboards jammed by irate customers, wondering why their email is 30 seconds late. And having observed (over many years) the indifference of BT towards customers that are thoughtless enough to be more than a couple of miles from their exchanges, we are quite relieved that we don't have to pass on their lies and indifference to a horde of disappointed users who wonder why they can only achieve even a 2Mbit connection.

Latterly, the magic of TouchCast has reinvigorated us with something that is absolutely new and unseen - the web inside video? It's a concept that will take time to be understood - but the BBC is making great use of the features and pioneering with us:  http://www.bbc.co.uk/news/business-30010400

Cashblack is a social enterprise that aims to promote and support black-owned businesses and charities through the provision of cashback to our registered users with the overall goal of promoting social change.

Founded in 2020, the need for financial and socio-economic empowerment within the black community was never more apparent – both globally and in the United Kingdom. Cashblack aims to benefit both the black community and society as a whole by decreasing the racial wealth gap through the promotion of black-owned businesses and the provision of funds back to consumers of these businesses through cashback.

You can register with us for free to browse through our wide array of black-owned goods and services providers. Once you've found your desired retailer and a purchase is made, we track your spending and, once confirmed by the retailer, we pay you a share of the commission as cashback. Once your cashback is confirmed, you can withdraw it directly to your bank account or registered PayPal address or you can donate the funds to one of our affiliated charities where we will match your donation with the same amount.

So – Whether you're looking for local eating spots for a dine-in or a take-away, the latest and most fashionable offerings from clothes and accessories designers, beauty and wellness brands to leave you looking and feeling your finest or any other goods and services providers you would ever need; 

Cashblack is here to support your support of black-owned businesses.

Short Description:
Somos uma startup 100% brasileira e responsável pela operação do Vrupi, um app global de transmissões de vídeo ao vivo no modelo pay-per-view, conectamos pessoas a experiências reais em qualquer lugar do mundo. Com um formato dinâmico e acessível, oferecemos um espaço onde criadores – os Vrupers – podem compartilhar vivências únicas, desde passeios culturais e explorações urbanas até tutoriais, conteúdos educativos e momentos autênticos do dia a dia.

Nosso propósito é proporcionar experiências imersivas e valiosas, permitindo que os espectadores escolham o que querem vivenciar e interajam por áudio em tempo real com os criadores. Diferente de plataformas convencionais, no Vrupi, cada transmissão tem um valor de ticket pré definido pelo criador, garantindo um modelo sustentável, de alta qualidade para quem compartilha  e personalizado para quem consome conteúdo.

Com uma proposta simples, ajudamos criadores a monetizarem suas experiências desde o primeiro dia, sem depender de publicidade ou algoritmos. O Vrupi é para exploradores, especialistas, artistas, guias locais e qualquer pessoa que queira transformar conhecimento ou as suas vivências em oportunidades.

Acreditamos que cada transmissão pode ser uma nova porta para o mundo. Seja para aprender algo novo, explorar um destino inusitado ou apenas ver a vida sob uma nova perspectiva, o Vrupi conecta você a histórias e pessoas reais.

Além disso, oferecemos ferramentas que facilitam a criação de conteúdo, agendamento de vrupis, definição de preços personalizados e uma interface intuitiva, pensada para que qualquer pessoa possa se tornar um criador. 

O que torna uma experiência inesquecível nem sempre é o cenário perfeito, mas o inesperado, o improviso, o real. No Vrupi, cada transmissão é única porque acontece ao vivo — sem cortes, sem filtros, com a verdade de quem está ali, vivendo de verdade. E é isso que transforma momentos simples em algo memorável.

TV Mall (PTY) LTD, is the first live shopping channel to existence in Africa. Not to be confused with direct response (infomercial type companies).

The channel is designed to give viewers live entertainment at the same time educating the viewer about innovative, new products that provide solutions to specific areas of their lives, not available in retail.

The added value of selling on the channel means local and international suppliers can launch their new and existing products faster to market at no cost on an electronic platform, using TV combined with e-commerce. 

Customers are able to use all forms of e-commerce platforms as well as our live call centre 24 hours a day to place orders directly or on line. A Live, real time, reality TV style shopping channel.
